Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class LightningUsageByFlexiPageMetrics

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.LightningUsageByFlexiPageMetrics
public class LightningUsageByFlexiPageMetrics extends SObject

Java class for LightningUsageByFlexiPageMetrics complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="LightningUsageByFlexiPageMetrics">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CoresBin2To4" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CoresBin4To8" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CoresBinOver8" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CoresBinUnder2" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DownlinkBin3To5" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DownlinkBin5To8" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DownlinkBin8To10" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DownlinkBinOver10" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DownlinkBinUnder3" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EptBin3To5" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EptBin5To8" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EptBin8To10" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EptBinOver10" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EptBinUnder3" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FlexiPageNameOrId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FlexiPageType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MedianEPT" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MetricsDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordCountEPT" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RttBin50To150" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RttBinOver150" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RttBinUnder50" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SumEPT" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalCount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
